comments.body: I believe make uses this Dockerfile to build an image to run tests with.

> I believe make uses this Dockerfile to build an image to run tests with.

Correct.  Though rather than complicate things further, I think we can get away with hard-coding a non-docker-hub FQIN for now.  If an issue is raised, I'm happy to go the build-arg route.  Otherwise, I think @mtrmac is right, the vast majority of users and robots will never care.
